zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Barker於1604年1月1日出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，她的父親John Barker41歲，母親Margaret Walter39歲。她於1622年5月20日與Isaac Stearns在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1677年4月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Barker于1604年1月1日出生在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德时，她的父亲John Barker41岁，母亲Margaret Walter39岁。她于1622年5月20日与Isaac Stearns在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1677年4月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Barker was born on 1 January 1604, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, her father, John Barker, was 41 and her mother, Margaret Walter, was 39. She married Isaac Stearns on 20 May 1622, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 23 April 1677, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Barker est née le 1 janvier 1604, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Barker, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Walter, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Isaac Stearns le 20 mai 1622, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1677, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Barker am 1. Januar 1604 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barker 41 und ihre Mutter Margaret Walter 39. Sie hat am 20. Mai 1622 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England Isaac Stearns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. April 1677 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Barker è nata il il 1 gennaio 1604 nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Barker, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margaret Walter, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Isaac Stearns il 20 maggio 1622, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1677, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Barkerが1604年1月1日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで生まれた時，父John Barkerは41歳，母Margaret Walterは39歳であった。1622年5月20日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでIsaac Stearnsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1677年4月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Barker(이)가 1604년 1월 1일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barker(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Walter(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1622년 5월 20일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Isaac Stearns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1677년 4월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Barker nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1604, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barker, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Walter, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Isaac Stearns em 20 de maio de 1622, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1677, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Barker родилась 1 января 1604 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Barker было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Walter, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Isaac Stearns 20 мая 1622 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 23 апреля 1677 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Barker nació el 1 de enero de 1604, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barker, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret Walter, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Isaac Stearns el 20 de mayo de 1622, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1677, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años.
